How Lemonaid Works

3 Easy Steps

1. Complete an online assessment

Tell us about your health history.

2. Medical team review

Our U.S. based medical team will review everything and follow up with questions.

3. FREE medicine delivery

2-3 business day shipping, discreet packaging, and no need to sign for it.

Call Us! We’re here to help

Lemonaid Health is a national telehealth company based in San Francisco, CA. Call us at 888-536-2267

Medical team licensed in all 50 states

Our clinical team is made up of physicians, pharmacists, nurse practitioners and registered nurses whose mission is to provide great care at a price you can afford. Our team is here to help you make informed decisions about which treatments are right for you.

Meet your medical team

In all states other than Kansas, New Jersey and Texas, Lemonaid services are provided by LMND Medical Group, Inc., A Professional Corporation, doing business as Lemonaid Health. In New Jersey, Lemonaid services are provided by LMND Medical Group Professional Corporation, with registered office 820 Bear Tavern Road, West Trenton, NJ 08628. In Texas, Lemonaid services are provided by LMND Medical Group, A Professional Association, with registered office 1999 Bryan Street, Suite 900, Dallas, TX 75201. Our team is based at 870 Market Street, Suite 415, San Francisco CA 94102, USA. You can call us at 888‐536‐2267.

Lemonaid Health Inc provides a variety of administrative and management services to the four medical groups.
